org.xmlunit.util.XPathFactoryConfigurer

Packages that use XPathFactoryConfigurer
Package
Description
org.xmlunit.util
Internal utilities hiding the differences between .NET and Java implementations.

  • Uses of XPathFactoryConfigurer in org.xmlunit.util

    Fields in org.xmlunit.util declared as XPathFactoryConfigurer
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final XPathFactoryConfigurer
    XPathFactoryConfigurer.Default
    The default instance which disables extension functions.
    static final XPathFactoryConfigurer
    XPathFactoryConfigurer.SecureProcessing
    The instance which enables secure processing thus disables execution of extension functions.
